name: Dynamic Agent Skills: A Lifecycle Survey and Taxonomy of Evolving Skill Libraries

description: arXiv:2607.10113v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language model agents increasingly store reusable procedures outside the model. These reusable procedures are often called \emph{skills}: they may be code functions, natural-language instructions, SKILL.md packages, workflow graphs, or learned adapters that a future agent can retrieve and invoke. This taxonomy-driven survey asks how such ski...
author: Yubo Li
